label: reasoning channel • single turn, clean visible answer, no marker leak
query: What is 17 multiplied by 23? Give the number and one short sentence explaining how you computed it.
notes: The baseline row for the domain: one reasoning-tempting turn (mental arithmetic) that must produce a non-empty visible answer with zero raw parser markers and a closed reasoning span. Works on both reasoning and instruct-only models (reasoningFieldExpected omitted → not scored). Off-CI (needs a model).
